source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	case when App_name ='HomeOrg' then 'CTA'
	when App_name ='MadCity' then 'MAC' 
    when App_name ='FHIA' then 'FHI'
    when App_name ='Statewide' then 'SWR'
    when App_name ='RiteWindow' then 'RTW'
	when App_name ='RenuityWest' then 'PBC'
    end as Division,
	Hashbytes('MD5', Case when [Flow ID] is null then Concat(coalesce(MOE_F_PID,'xxx'), Coalesce(Flow_version_Id,'yyy'), coalesce(Campaign_ID,'zzz')) 
		else Concat([Flow ID], Coalesce(Flow_Version_ID,'xxx')) end ) as PK ,
	Event_UUID ,Event_Code, Event_Name, Event_Source, Event_time, Event_type, 
	UID as LeadID, Email_ID as EmailID, Mobile_number as Phone, 
	APP_Name, DB_Name, EventAttributes, UserAttributes, Campaign_Channel, Campaign_ID, Campaign_name, Campaign_Type, 
	Flow_Version_Id, Flow_Version_Name, MOE_Campaign_channel, MOE_campaign_Content_Type, MOE_Campaign_Tags, MOE_Delivery_Type, MOE_F_PID, MOE_F_Pname,
	MOE_Event_category, MOE_Event_Source, MOE_Attribution_Type, MOE_Campaign_User_Type, MOE_Flow_Action_Cids,MOE_Flow_Conversion_Event, MOE_FLow_Goal_name, MOE_Flow_ID, MOE_Flow_Name,
	MOE_FLow_Name, MOE_Flow_Trip_ID, [Flow ID] as FlowID, FlowName, Flow_Type, MoEngage_user_ID, getdate() as InsertedTS, getdate() as LastUpdatedTS
	from ODS.MOENGAGE_EVENT_DATA
	--Where Event_time > (Select max(Event_time) from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Lifecycle_Events)

With MKTNG_Campaign_Events as (

Select App_name, EventDate, Campaign_ID, MOE_F_PID, FLOW_Version_ID, FLOWID ,
Campaign_name, MOE_F_Pname, Flow_version_Name, FlowName, Campaign_Channel,

---Email
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Sent' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailSent,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Delivered' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailDelivered,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Opened' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailOpened,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Clicked' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailClicked,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Bounced' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailBounced,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Deferred' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailDeferred,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Dropped' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailDropped,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Soft Bounced' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailSoftBounced,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Email Unsubscribed' then 1 else 0 end ) as EmailUnsubscribed,
Sum(Case when Event_name='MOE_EMAIL_ESP_DROPPED' then 1 else 0 end ) as MOE_EMAIL_ESP_DROPPED,

--SMS
Sum(Case when Event_name='SMS Sent' then 1 else 0 end ) as SMSSent,
Sum(Case when Event_name='SMS Delivered' then 1 else 0 end ) as SMSDelivered,
Sum(Case when Event_name='SMS Delivery Failed' then 1 else 0 end ) as SMSDeliveryFailed,
Sum(Case when Event_name='SMS Clicked' then 1 else 0 end ) as SMSClicked,



--Flow
Sum(Case when Event_name='User Entered Flow' then 1 else 0 end ) as UserEnteredFlow,
Sum(Case when Event_name='User Exited Flow' then 1 else 0 end ) as UserExitedFlow,
Sum(Case when Event_name='MOE_FLOW_TRIP_CONVERSION' then 1 else 0 end ) as MOE_FLOW_TRIP_CONVERSION

from (
Select Distinct App_name,Cast(Event_Time as date) as EventDate, Campaign_ID, MOE_F_PID, FLOW_Version_ID, FLOWID ,
Campaign_name, MOE_F_Pname, Flow_version_Name, FlowName, LeadId, Event_Name,Campaign_Channel
from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Lifecycle_Events
where  Coalesce(Campaign_id, MOE_F_PID, FlowID) is not null 
)a

Group by App_name,EventDate, Campaign_ID, MOE_F_PID, FLOW_Version_ID, FLOWID
,Campaign_name, MOE_F_Pname, Flow_version_Name, FlowName,Campaign_Channel

), 

Flow_Conversion_events as (

Select Cast(Event_Time as date) as EventDate,MOE_Flow_ID,MOE_Flow_Name,Flow_Version_Id,Flow_Version_Name, MOE_Attribution_type,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Appt Set' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadApptSet,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Created' then 1 else 0 end ) as LeadCreated,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Issued' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadIssued,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Sold' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadSold,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Sat' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadSat,
Sum(Case when Moe_Flow_Conversion_Event='Lead Disposition Change' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadDispositionChange

from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Lifecycle_Events where event_name='MOE_FLOW_TRIP_CONVERSION' 

Group by Cast(Event_Time as date),MOE_Flow_ID,MOE_Flow_Name,Flow_Version_Id,Flow_Version_Name, MOE_Attribution_type
),

T_Flow_Campaign_SplitData AS (
    SELECT  
		Cast(Event_Time as date) as EventDate,
        MOE_Flow_Name, 
        MOE_Flow_Id, 
        MOE_Flow_goal_Name, 
        TRIM(value) AS MOE_Flow_Action_Cid,
        Flow_version_id, 
        Flow_version_name,
        MOE_Attribution_Type,
        MOE_Flow_Conversion_Event,
        LeadId
    FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_LIFECYCLE_Events
    CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(MOE_Flow_Action_Cids, ',')
    WHERE event_name = 'MOE_FLOW_TRIP_CONVERSION'  --AND CAST(Event_time AS date) = '2025-09-09'
)
, 
T_Flow_Campaign_Conversion_metrics as (
SELECT 
	EventDate,
    MOE_Flow_Name,
    MOE_Flow_Id,
   -- MOE_Flow_goal_Name,
    MOE_Flow_Action_Cid,
    Flow_version_id,
    Flow_version_name,
    MOE_Attribution_Type,
    ISNULL([Lead Created], 0)      AS LeadCreated,
    ISNULL([Lead Appt Set], 0)     AS LeadApptSet,
    ISNULL([Lead Disposition Change], 0)    AS LeadDispositionChange,
    ISNULL([Lead Issued], 0)       AS LeadIssued,
    ISNULL([Lead Sold], 0)         AS LeadSold,
    ISNULL([Lead Sat], 0)          AS LeadSat
FROM (
    SELECT  
		EventDate,
        MOE_Flow_Name,
        MOE_Flow_Id,
       -- MOE_Flow_goal_Name,
        MOE_Flow_Action_Cid,
        Flow_version_id,
        Flow_version_name,
        MOE_Attribution_Type,
        MOE_Flow_Conversion_Event,
        LeadId
    FROM T_Flow_Campaign_SplitData
	) AS src
PIVOT (
    COUNT(LeadId)
    FOR MOE_Flow_Conversion_Event IN (
        [Lead Created], 
        [Lead Appt Set], 
        [Lead Disposition Change], 
        [Lead Issued], 
        [Lead Sold], 
        [Lead Sat]
    )
	) AS p
),


Flow_Campaign_Conversion_events as (

Select T1.* , T2. Campaign_name , null as FlowId
from T_Flow_Campaign_Conversion_metrics  T1 Left join 
(Select Distinct  Campaign_id, Campaign_name
 from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_LIFECYCLE_Events where MOE_F_Pid is not null 
 ) T2 on T1.MOE_Flow_Action_Cid =T2.Campaign_id

),

T_Standalone_Campaigns as (
Select Distinct Campaign_ID,Event_Time as Event_Time,Event_name, LeadID 
from EDW.DIM_MKTNG_LIFECYCLE_Events 
where Campaign_id is not null and Event_name in ('Email Sent','Email Delivered', 'SMS Sent') 
),
T_Standalone_campaign_Conv as (
Select Distinct  A.Campaign_id, 'View Through Attribution' as Attribution_type,  C.Event_name, C.Event_Time as Event_time,C.LeadID 
from T_Standalone_Campaigns A
Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_LIFECYCLE_Events C on A.LeadID=C.LeadID and  C.Event_Time  BETWEEN  A.Event_Time AND DATEADD(day, 7, A.Event_Time)
where C.event_name  in ('Lead Disposition Change','Lead Issued','Lead Sold','Lead Sat','Lead Appt Set','Lead Created') 
),
Standalone_Campaign_Conversion_Metrics as (
Select  Cast(Event_time as date) As EventDate, Campaign_Id,Attribution_type as MOE_Attribution_type,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Created' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadCreated,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Appt Set' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadApptSet,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Issued' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadIssued,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Sold' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadSold,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Sat' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadSat,
Sum(Case when Event_name='Lead Disposition Change' then 1 else 0 end) as LeadDispositionChange
from T_Standalone_campaign_Conv 
Group by  Cast(Event_time as date), Campaign_Id,Attribution_type
)

---------------------------------------------Final query 

Select 
--case when M.App_name ='HomeOrg' then 'CTA' when M.App_Name='MadCity' then 'MAC' end as Division,
case when M.App_name ='HomeOrg' then 'CTA'
	when M.App_name ='MadCity' then 'MAC' 
    when M.App_name ='FHIA' then 'FHI'
    when M.App_name ='Statewide' then 'SWR'
    when M.App_name ='RiteWindow' then 'RTW'
    when App_name ='RenuityWest' then 'PBC'
    end as Division,
Hashbytes('MD5', Case when M.FlowID is null then Concat(Coalesce(M.MOE_F_PID,'xxx'), Coalesce(M.Flow_version_Id,'yyy'), Coalesce(M.Campaign_ID,'zzz')) 
	else Concat(M.FlowID, Coalesce(M.Flow_Version_ID,'xxx')) end ) as PK ,
	
M.EventDate, M.Campaign_ID, M.MOE_F_PID, M.FLOW_Version_ID, M.FlowID,
--M.MOE_F_Pname, M.Campaign_name, M.Flow_version_Name, M.FlowName,M.Campaign_Channel,

M.EmailBounced,
M.EmailClicked,
M.EmailDeferred,
M.EmailDelivered,
M.EmailDropped,
M.EmailOpened,
M.EmailSent,
M.EmailSoftBounced,
M.EmailUnsubscribed,
M.MOE_EMAIL_ESP_DROPPED,
M.SMSClicked,
M.SMSDelivered,
M.SMSDeliveryFailed,
M.SMSSent,
M.UserEnteredFlow,
M.UserExitedFlow,
M.MOE_FLOW_TRIP_CONVERSION,


case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.MOE_Attribution_type 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.MOE_Attribution_type 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.MOE_Attribution_type  end as MOE_Attribution_type,

case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadCreated 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadCreated 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadCreated end as LeadCreated,  
	 
case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadApptSet 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadApptSet 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadApptSet end as LeadApptSet , 
	 
case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadIssued 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadIssued 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadIssued end as LeadIssued  ,
	 
case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadSold 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadSold 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadSold end as LeadSold,  
	 
case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadSat 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadSat 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadSat end as LeadSat,  
	 
case When M.FlowID is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null then SC.LeadDispositionChange 
	 when M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is not null then C.LeadDispositionChange 
	 when M.FlowId is not null then F.LeadDispositionChange end as LeadDispositionChange  

--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadCreated else F.LeadCreated end LeadCreated,
--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadApptSet else F.LeadApptSet end LeadApptSet,
--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadIssued else F.LeadIssued end LeadIssued,
--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadSold else F.LeadSold end LeadSold,
--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadSat else F.LeadSat end LeadSat,
--case When M.FlowID is null then C.LeadDispositionChange else F.LeadDispositionChange end LeadDispositionChange


from MKTNG_Campaign_Events M 
Left join Flow_Conversion_Events F  on M.FlowID is not null and M.EventDate=F.EventDate and M.FlowId=F.MOE_Flow_ID and M.FLOW_Version_ID=F.FLOW_Version_ID
Left join Flow_Campaign_Conversion_events C on M.FlowID is null and M.EventDate=C.EventDate and M.MOE_F_Pid=C.MOE_Flow_Id and M.Campaign_ID=C.MOE_Flow_Action_Cid and M.FLOW_Version_ID=C.FLOW_Version_ID
Left join Standalone_Campaign_Conversion_Metrics SC on M.FlowId is null and M.MOE_F_PID is null and M.EventDate=SC.EventDate and  M.Campaign_ID=SC.Campaign_id

--where M.Campaign_id='68ca4c147c589cfff1e87812' and SC.MOE_Attribution_type='View Through Attribution' --and M.Flow_Version_id='68b5ceda33baf661cbbae1cb'
--and --M.Campaign_channel='SMS' and M.EventDate>='2025-09-06'


Order by 3
